'''âth-g-f''' ('''kathagaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magadize|magadize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magadize|magadize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-g-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathagaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithagaf|thithagaf]] || [[word:jithagaf|jithagaf]] || [[word:shithagaf|shithagaf]] || [[word:kithagaf|kithagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthagaf|thuthuthagaf]] || [[word:jujuthagaf|jujuthagaf]] || [[word:shushuthagaf|shushuthagaf]] || [[word:kukuthagaf|kukuthagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthagaf|thuthagaf]] || [[word:juthagaf|juthagaf]] || [[word:shuthagaf|shuthagaf]] || [[word:kuthagaf|kuthagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthagaf|thuthagaf]] || [[word:juthagaf|juthagaf]] || [[word:shuthagaf|shuthagaf]] || [[word:kuthagaf|kuthagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethagaf|thethagaf]] || [[word:jethagaf|jethagaf]] || [[word:shethagaf|shethagaf]] || [[word:kethagaf|kethagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothagaf|thothothagaf]] || [[word:jojothagaf|jojothagaf]] || [[word:shoshothagaf|shoshothagaf]] || [[word:kokothagaf|kokothagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothagaf|thothagaf]] || [[word:jothagaf|jothagaf]] || [[word:shothagaf|shothagaf]] || [[word:kothagaf|kothagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothagaf|thothagaf]] || [[word:jothagaf|jothagaf]] || [[word:shothagaf|shothagaf]] || [[word:kothagaf|kothagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthagaf|thĂŠthagaf]] || [[word:jĂŠthagaf|jĂŠthagaf]] || [[word:shĂŠthagaf|shĂŠthagaf]] || [[word:kĂŠthagaf|kĂŠthagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathagaf|thathathagaf]] || [[word:jajathagaf|jajathagaf]] || [[word:shashathagaf|shashathagaf]] || [[word:kakathagaf|kakathagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathagaf|thathagaf]] || [[word:jathagaf|jathagaf]] || [[word:shathagaf|shathagaf]] || [[word:kathagaf|kathagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathagaf|thathagaf]] || [[word:jathagaf|jathagaf]] || [[word:shathagaf|shathagaf]] || [[word:kathagaf|kathagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathagaf|shathagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathagaf|goshathagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathagaf|gokishathagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathagafnĂŒ|shathagafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathagafnknĂŒ|goshathagafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagafnĂŒ|gokishathagafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathagafshĂ«|shathagafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathagafnkshĂ«|goshathagafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathagafshĂ«|gokishathagafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagafro|shathagafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagafnkro|goshathagafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagafro|gokishathagafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagafmu|shathagafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagafnkmu|goshathagafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagafmu|gokishathagafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathagafsher|shathagafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathagafnksher|goshathagafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathagafsher|gokishathagafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathagafng|shathagafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathagafnkng|goshathagafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathagafng|gokishathagafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathagafya|shathagafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathagafnkya|goshathagafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathagafya|gokishathagafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathagafyam|shathagafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathagafnkyam|goshathagafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathagafyam|gokishathagafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagafnĂŒshĂ«|shathagafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathagafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathagafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagafnĂŒro|shathagafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagafnknĂŒro|goshathagafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagafnĂŒro|gokishathagafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagafnĂŒmu|shathagafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagafnknĂŒmu|goshathagafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagafnĂŒmu|gokishathagafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagafshĂ«nĂŒ|shathagafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathagafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathagafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagafshĂ«ro|shathagafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagafnkshĂ«ro|goshathagafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagafshĂ«ro|gokishathagafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagafshĂ«mu|shathagafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagafnkshĂ«mu|goshathagafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagafshĂ«mu|gokishathagafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagafronĂŒ|shathagafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagafnkronĂŒ|goshathagafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagafronĂŒ|gokishathagafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagafroshĂ«|shathagafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagafnkroshĂ«|goshathagafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagafroshĂ«|gokishathagafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagafromu|shathagafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagafnkromu|goshathagafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagafromu|gokishathagafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagafmunĂŒ|shathagafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagafnkmunĂŒ|goshathagafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagafmunĂŒ|gokishathagafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagafmushĂ«|shathagafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagafnkmushĂ«|goshathagafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagafmushĂ«|gokishathagafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagafmuro|shathagafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagafnkmuro|goshathagafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagafmuro|gokishathagafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
